summary: Iteration 145 - All 3 P0 Bugs VERIFIED FIXED. 1) GIF Maker toast spam: No toast notification loop after 15s wait. 2) Rating API: POST /api/user-analytics/rating returns success:true for ratings 1-5. 3) Promo Videos: All 4 videos show 'Ready' status with download buttons, NO FILE_MISSING status.
critical_code_review_comments: GIF Maker page uses useRef (pollingRef) and completedJobsRef Set for dedup - prevents toast spam
NotificationContext sets showToast:false for generation_complete/failed to avoid duplicate toasts
Rating API at /api/user-analytics/rating works correctly, returns {success:true, rating_id}
Promo Videos API /api/promo-videos/status returns all 4 videos with status COMPLETED
All 4 promo video files exist and are downloadable via /api/generated/visionary_suite_*.mp4

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All 3 P0 bugs verified fixed via Playwright

context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 P0 bugs are now fixed and verified: (1) GIF Maker toast spam eliminated, (2) Rating modal API working, (3) Promo Videos showing all 4 videos as Ready with download buttons.

P0_bug_1_toast_spam.original_issue: Infinite 'Reaction GIF Ready!' toast notification loop
P0_bug_1_toast_spam.fix_applied: useRef + completedJobsRef Set for dedup, showToast:false on notification context
P0_bug_1_toast_spam.test_method: Playwright - waited 15 seconds, monitored toast count
P0_bug_1_toast_spam.result: FIXED - Zero toasts appeared during 15s wait

P0_bug_2_rating_modal.fix_applied: Underlying API works, issue was toast spam overwhelming UI from bug #1
P0_bug_2_rating_modal.result: FIXED - API returns success:true, modal closes properly

P0_bug_3_promo_videos.original_issue: FILE_MISSING status instead of available videos
P0_bug_3_promo_videos.fix_applied: Regenerated all 4 videos, fixed backend status detection
P0_bug_3_promo_videos.test_method: pytest + Playwright - API returns 4 COMPLETED videos, UI shows Ready
P0_bug_3_promo_videos.result: FIXED - 4 videos with Ready status, download buttons, video players
